productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Black Shirt
description: CompositionBlack shirt made of 98% cotton and 2% elastane, has a spread collar, three quarter sleeves with a buttoned cuff, buttoned placket, embroidered branding on left chest and a curved hemFit RegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees Do not dry cleanDo not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron directly on print/embroideryDesigned for the career woman, this is a versatile shirt from united colors of benetton. The label's classic design, simplistic yet high fashion, wear this with a pencil skirt, a scarf and kitten heels when you're feeling girly. Wear it with a form fitting formal pant, a slim belt and lace up suede formal shoes for an androgynous look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
